creator: rpsfa@rit.edu
text:
At the moment, swills@ and I are looking into the best way to handle this.  ruby-rmagick installs the library(RMagick2.so), but does not register with the gem framework.  As a result, Ruby apps that depend on the rmagick gem complain that the gem is not installed.

It's on hold at the moment as I look into it a bit more and identify the best way to proceed.
